text.p: POOR STATE of ROAD IN OUR TOWN .

I write this letter with deep senses of commitment and responsibility first to commend your efforts for the job well and secondly to highlight the poor state of road in our town and some consequences.

The Local Government seems to lips service to road for instance the Local Government have established secondary schools, Adult classes Despensaries and metanity home. There is even pipe-born water inside and outside the town.
But the 1 character roads are bad, there is road that led to mar-ket square e in order for us to buy and sells farm pro-duct, And also for the transpor-tation of goods.

the consequences of poor state of roads in our town are 1 character to give room to social vises ie it create way for criminals, also it caused an accident, when the road is poor, accident is easy caused. It also reduce crop transport , when roads are not good to the market square the Agricul-tural crop will not wi be transport-ted
